arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou's dream Tottenham starting XI with two key signings in January transfer window
arts.sum: A lot of it was going to be around where we're at around this time," he said on Christmas Eve. Christmas Day is a time for dreaming and here at football.london we have decided to take a look at who Spurs could sign in January to create a dream starting line-up.

New centre-back transfer and injury boost on Postecoglou's Spurs Christmas list
arts.sum: The same has happened once again this year and Tottenham cannot afford for that to be the case in the final few months of the campaign as they look to achieve their goals. Spurs did manage to sign Dominic Solanke in the summer but they are still a tad light up front, especially with the club unable to get a consistent run of games out of Richarlison due to his persistent injury issues.

arts.ttl: The first Nottingham Forest XI ever picked by Nuno Espirito Santo now looks very interesting
